fields.name: Buy-from Vendor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the identifier of the vendor that you bought the items from.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the purchase invoice number.

fields.name: Pay-to Vendor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the vendor that you received the invoice from.

fields.name: Pay-to Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the vendor to whom the invoice is to be paid.

fields.name: Pay-to Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name of the vendor who you receive the invoice from.

fields.name: Pay-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address of the vendor that you received the invoice from.

fields.name: Pay-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: Pay-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the vendor on the purchase document.

fields.name: Pay-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the person you should contact at the vendor who you received the invoice from.

fields.name: Your Reference
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the vendor's reference.
The program copies the reference from the Your Reference field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the reference because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Ship-to Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for an alternate shipment address if you want to ship to another address than the one that has been entered automatically. This field is also used in case of drop shipment.

fields.name: Ship-to Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the company at the address to which the items in the purchase order were shipped.

fields.name: Ship-to Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name of the company at the address to which the items in the purchase order were shipped.

fields.name: Ship-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address that the items in the purchase order were shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: Ship-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the vendor on the purchase document.

fields.name: Ship-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact person at the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Order Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date the purchase header was created.
The program copies the date from the Order Date field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the order date because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date the purchase header was posted.

fields.name: Expected Receipt Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which the invoiced items were expected.

fields.name: Posting Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies any text that is entered to accompany the posting, for example for information to auditors.

fields.name: Payment Terms Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a formula that calculates the payment due date, payment discount date, and payment discount amount.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the invoice is due.

fields.name: Payment Discount %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the payment discount percent granted if payment is made on or before the date in the Pmt. Discount Date field.

fields.name: Pmt. Discount Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which the amount in the entry must be paid for a payment discount to be granted.

fields.name: Shipment Method Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the delivery conditions of the related shipment, such as free on board (FOB).

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the location where the items are registered.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Vendor Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor's market type to link business transactions made for the vendor with the appropriate account in the general ledger.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code used to calculate the amounts on the invoice.

fields.name: Currency Factor
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Prices Including VAT
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the purchase prices on the invoice lines include VAT.
The program copies the information from the Prices Including VAT field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the contents of the field because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Invoice Disc. Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code that will be used to find the invoice discount that was granted on the invoice.
The program copies the code from the Invoice Disc. Code field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the code because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Language Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the language used on the invoice.
The program copies the code from the Language Code field on the purchase header.
The language code made it possible for the items on the purchase lines to be written in the vendor's language.
You cannot change the code because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Purchaser Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which purchaser is assigned to the vendor.

fields.name: Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the associated order.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether a comment has been entered for this purchase invoice header.
To view a comment or create a new one, click Related Information, point to Invoice, and then click Comments. The Purch. Comment Sheet window will appear. You can see the existing comments and create new ones.
You can also enter a comment in the Notes FactBox.

fields.name: No. Printed
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many times the document has been printed.

fields.name: On Hold
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the posted invoice will be included in the payment suggestion when the purchase header has been invoiced and you run the Suggest Vendor Payments batch job.
Before posting you can enter your initials - or whatever you like - in the field. This marks it so that it will be put on hold.
If the field contains something (is not blank), the entry will not be included when you run the Suggest Vendor Payments batch job. The field will show that the invoice is waiting for approval. If the field is blank, the entry will be included in an automatic payment.
The field can be changed on the vendor ledger entry after posting.

fields.name: Applies-to Doc. Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the invoice has been applied to an already-posted document. If so, the field shows the type of the document applied to.
The program copies the type from the Applies-to Doc. Type field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the document type because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Applies-to Doc. No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the invoice has been applied to an already-posted document. If so, the field contains the number of the document.
The program copies the number from the Applies-to Doc. No. field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the document number because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Bal. Account No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of the general ledger account or bank account to which a balancing entry for the invoice was posted.
The program copies the number from the Bal. Account No. field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the balancing account because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total, in the currency of the invoice, of the amounts on all the invoice lines.

fields.name: Amount Including VAT
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the amounts, including VAT, on all the lines on the document.

fields.name: Vendor Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor's order number.

fields.name: Vendor Invoice No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document number of the original document you received from the vendor. You can require the document number for posting, or let it be optional. By default, it's required, so that this document references the original. Making document numbers optional removes a step from the posting process. For example, if you attach the original invoice as a PDF, you might not need to enter the document number. To specify whether document numbers are required, in the Purchases & Payables Setup window, select or clear the Ext. Doc. No. Mandatory field.

fields.name: VAT Registration No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the vendor's VAT registration number.
The program copies the number from the VAT Registration No. field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the number because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Sell-to Customer No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of your customer that the vendor shipped the items to directly. This field is used only when the line is for a drop shipment.
The program copies the number from the Sell-to Customer No. field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the number because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Reason Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the reason code that is associated with the invoice.
The program copies the reason code from the Reason Code field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the reason code because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the general business posting group code that is assigned to the vendor that invoiced the shipment.
The program copies the code from the Gen. Bus. Posting Group field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the code because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Transaction Type
fields.tooltip:
Shows the transaction type of the purchase header that this line was posted from.
The program copies the transaction type from the Transaction Type field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the transaction type because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Transport Method
fields.tooltip:
Shows the transport method of the purchase header that this line was posted from.
The program copies the transport method from the Transport Method field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the transport method because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: VAT Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip:
Shows the vendor's VAT country/region code.
The program copies the VAT country/region code from the VAT Country/Region Code field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the VAT country/region code because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Buy-from Vendor Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the vendor who shipped the items.

fields.name: Buy-from Vendor Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name of the vendor that you’re buying from.

fields.name: Buy-from Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address of the vendor who shipped the items.

fields.name: Buy-from Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: Buy-from City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the vendor on the purchase document.

fields.name: Buy-from Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the person to contact at the vendor who shipped the items.

fields.name: Pay-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: Pay-to County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the state, province or county as a part of the address.

fields.name: Pay-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region code of the address.

fields.name: Buy-from Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: Buy-from County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the state, province or county as a part of the address.

fields.name: Buy-from Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the vendor who delivered the items.

fields.name: Ship-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: Ship-to County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the state, province or county as a part of the address.

fields.name: Ship-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region code of the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Bal. Account Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the balancing account type used in the invoice.
The program copies the balancing account type from the Bal. Account Type field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the type because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Order Address Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the order address of the related vendor.

fields.name: Entry Point
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code of the port of entry where the items pass into your country/region.
The program copies the code from the Entry Point field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the code because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Correction
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether this purchase invoice has been posted as a corrective entry.
The program copies the code from the Correction field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the code because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Document Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the related document was created.

fields.name: Area
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the area code used in the invoice.
The program copies the code from the Area field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the code because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Transaction Specification
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the transaction specification that was used in the invoice.
The program copies the code from the Transaction Specification field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the code because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Payment Method Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the method of payment to vendors. The program has copied the code from the Payment Method Code field on the purchase header.

fields.name: Pre-Assigned No. Series
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the number series that was used to assign a number to the purchase document from which the invoice was created.
If the posted invoice was created from an invoice, the program automatically copied this field from the No. Series field on the purchase header. Otherwise, the field is blank.
You cannot change the pre-assigned number series because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the number series that was used to assign a number to the posted invoice.
The program automatically copies this field from the Posting No. Series field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the number series because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Order No. Series
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the number series that was used to assign a number to the order from which the invoice was created.
The program automatically copies this field from the No. Series field on the order header.
If the invoice was not created from an order, the field is blank.
You cannot change the number series because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Pre-Assigned No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the purchase document that the posted invoice was created for.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the ID of the user who posted the purchase document.
You cannot change the user ID because the invoice has been posted.

fields.name: Source Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the source code that is linked to the purchase invoice header.
The program copies the source code from either the Purchases field or the Deleted Document field in the Source Code Setup table.
You cannot change the source code because the entry has been posted.

fields.name: Tax Area Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the tax area that is used to calculate and post sales tax.

fields.name: Tax Liable
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the customer or vendor is liable for sales tax.

fields.name: VAT Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the VAT business posting group of the vendor.
The program copies the code from the VAT Bus. Posting Group field on the purchase header.

fields.name: VAT Base Discount %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage to use to discount the VAT element if a payment discount is to be posted. The value is validated against the maximum possible VAT Tolerance % field value in the General Ledger Setup. The maximum value cannot be overridden with the exception of a credit note where you can manually enter the value used for the payment discount.

fields.name: Prepayment No. Series
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the number series that was used to assign a number to the posted prepayment invoice If the invoice is a prepayment invoice.
The program automatically copies this field from the Prepayment No. Series field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the number series because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Prepayment Invoice
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the invoice is a prepayment invoice.

fields.name: Prepayment Order No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of the purchase order that this prepayment invoice was posted from if the invoice is a prepayment invoice.
You cannot change the order number because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Quote No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the purchase quote document if a quote was used to start the purchase process.

fields.name: Creditor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the vendor.

fields.name: Payment Reference
fields.tooltip: Specifies the payment of the purchase invoice.

fields.name: VAT Reporting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT date on the invoice.

fields.name: Ship-to Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the telephone number of the company's shipping address.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.


Additional Information


You cannot change the contents of this field. Click the drop-down arrow to see the combination of posted dimension values.


The value 0 represents an empty dimension set.

fields.name: Remit-to Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the vendor's remit address for this invoice.

fields.name: Closed
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the posted purchase invoice is paid. The check box will also be selected if a credit memo for the remaining amount has been applied.

fields.name: Remaining Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that remains to be paid for the posted purchase invoice.

fields.name: Vendor Ledger Entry No.
fields.tooltip:
Used to determine if the posted purchase invoice is paid.
The state is shown in the Paid field on the posted purchase invoice.

fields.name: Invoice Discount Amount
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the amount that is calculated and shown in the Invoice Discount Amount field at the bottom of purchase invoices.
Specifies the amount that is deducted from the value shown in the Total Amount Incl. VAT field.
If you have set up invoice discounts for the vendor, then the specified percentage value is automatically inserted in the Vendor Invoice Discount % field if the criteria are met. The calculated discount amount is inserted in the Invoice Discount Amount field, but you can change it manually. For more information, see How to: Set Up Invoice Discount Terms.

fields.name: Cancelled
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the posted purchase invoice has been either corrected or canceled.

fields.name: Corrective
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the posted purchase invoice is a corrective document.

fields.name: Dispute Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies if there is an ongoing dispute for this document.

fields.name: Campaign No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the campaign that the document is linked to.

fields.name: Buy-from Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contact you bought the items from.

fields.name: Pay-to Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contact you received the invoice from.

fields.name: Responsibility Center
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the responsibility center that serves the vendor on this purchase document.
